notes: Seed queries are editorial hypotheses until validated with Google Search Console data.

pages.intent: Calculate adult BMI from height and weight and interpret the screening category.
pages.snippetAngle: Free metric and imperial adult BMI calculation with category context.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own BMI calculation queries; link to healthy-weight range for height-based weight estimates.

pages.intent: Estimate total daily energy expenditure from BMR and activity level.
pages.snippetAngle: Estimate TDEE and maintenance energy from body metrics and activity.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own expenditure and maintenance queries; calorie-calculator owns intake targets by goal.

pages.intent: Plan daily calorie intake for maintenance, loss, or gain.
pages.snippetAngle: Daily calorie targets for maintenance, fat loss, and muscle gain.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own intake-planning queries; TDEE owns expenditure terminology and BMR owns resting energy.

pages.intent: Estimate resting energy expenditure with the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
pages.snippetAngle: Calculate estimated resting calories with the disclosed Mifflin-St Jeor formula.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own resting-energy queries and explain the next step to TDEE without targeting TDEE as primary.

pages.intent: Estimate adult body-fat percentage from circumference measurements.
pages.snippetAngle: U.S. Navy circumference estimate with metric and imperial measurements.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own circumference-based body-fat estimates; BMI and waist-ratio pages remain screening tools.

pages.intent: Estimate an adult BMI-based screening weight range from height.
pages.snippetAngle: Calculate a BMI-based adult weight range from height with clear limitations.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own height-to-weight-range queries; BMI calculator owns current BMI classification.

secondaryQueries: how much water should i drink calculator
pages.intent: Estimate a general daily fluid planning target from weight and exercise.
pages.snippetAngle: Daily hydration estimate by body weight and exercise duration, with safety limits.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own general adult hydration planning and avoid medical fluid-prescription intent.

pages.intent: Split a calorie target into protein, carbohydrate, and fat planning amounts.
pages.snippetAngle: Convert daily calories into a transparent protein, carbohydrate, and fat split.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own three-macronutrient split queries; protein calculator owns protein-only requirements.

secondaryQueries: grams of protein per day calculator
pages.intent: Estimate a daily protein range from body weight and selected activity goal.
pages.snippetAngle: Daily protein grams by body weight with an explicit planning factor.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own protein-only queries; macro calculator owns full macro distribution.

pages.intent: Convert running distance and elapsed time into pace per kilometer or mile.
pages.snippetAngle: Calculate running pace in min/km or min/mile from distance and finish time.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own observed pace conversion; future race-prediction tools must target prediction intent separately.

pages.intent: Create a rough bedtime or wake-time plan from target sleep duration and cycle assumptions.
pages.snippetAngle: Plan bedtime or wake time with transparent cycle and sleep-latency assumptions.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own sleep timing and duration planning; sleep self-check owns recent sleep-pattern reflection.

pages.intent: Estimate the next period, ovulation day, and fertile window from average cycle length.
pages.snippetAngle: Estimate next period and fertile-window dates with irregular-cycle limitations.
pages.cannibalizationGuard: Own cycle-date estimates; due-date calculator owns pregnancy dating.
